title: Timber64SMP Modpack
description: 🌲This is the official modpack of Timber64SMP! This modpack includes adding vanilla textured planes, quests, better end, seasons, and a immersive cooking mod!🌲
body:
🌲This is the official modpack of Timber64SMP! This modpack includes adding vanilla textured planes, quests, better end, seasons, and a immersive cooking mod!🌲

🌲This pack was inspired by a Minecraft server I made almost a year ago and slowly started to add mods to it. In this modpack I aimed to put together many different and unique adventure mods that would give a vanilla expanded experience.🌲
